name: Dr. Pramod D. Shendge
experience: Professor, Department of Instrumentation & Control Engineering, COEP Technological University (2019–Present)
Research Fellow, Process Control Lab, Savitribai Phule Pune University (2007–2009)
publications: P. D. Shendge, "Adaptive Control of Industrial Processes using Machine Learning," International Journal of Control Systems, 2021.
P. D. Shendge and A. K. Joshi, "Robust PID Tuning for Multivariable Processes," Journal of Process Control, 2019.
P. D. Shendge, "Fault Detection and Diagnosis in Chemical Processes," Proceedings of the IEEE Intl. Conf. on Industrial Automation, 2018.
patents: Smart Industrial Sensor Calibration System, India Patent (2022).
Wireless Process Monitoring Device with Low-Power Transceiver, India Patent (2021).
achievements: Best Teacher Award, COEP Technological University (2020).

name: Prof. Dayaram N. Sonawane
research: Embedded Systems, Model Predictive Control, Optimization
experience: Senior Research Engineer, Embedded Systems Lab, Industry (2007–2011)
publications: D. N. Sonawane, "Model Predictive Control for Nonlinear Processes," Control Engineering Practice, 2020.
D. N. Sonawane and R. S. Kale, "Optimization Techniques for Predictive Controllers," IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics, 2018.
D. N. Sonawane, "Embedded Systems for Medical Instrumentation," Journal of Embedded Systems, 2017.
patents: Predictive Control Module for Energy Efficient Process Plants, India Patent (2019).
achievements: Recognized for curriculum development in Embedded Systems (2018).

name: Prof. Chetankumar Y. Patil
research: Signal Processing, Digital Filters, Sensor Signal Conditioning
experience: Research Associate, Signal Processing Group, IIT Kanpur (2012–2016)
publications: C. Y. Patil, "Advanced Digital Filter Design for Biomedical Signals," IEEE Sensors Journal, 2020.
C. Y. Patil and S. R. Deshpande, "Noise Reduction Techniques for Low-SNR Sensors," Measurement Science Review, 2018.
achievements: Award for best paper in National Conference on Signal Processing (2019).

name: Prof. Sanjaykumar L. Patil
experience: Industry experience: Power Electronics Design Engineer (2008–2012)
publications: S. L. Patil, "Efficient Inverter Topologies for Renewable Energy Systems," Renewable Power Journal, 2021.
S. L. Patil, "High-Efficiency Motor Drives for Industrial Automation," IEEE Transactions on Power Electronics, 2019.
patents: Low Harmonic Grid-Tied Inverter Design, India Patent (2020)
achievements: Industry-academia collaborative award for renewable energy project (2021).

name: Prof. Rajendra D. Kokate
research: Process Instrumentation, Industrial Sensors, Measurement Systems
publications: R. D. Kokate, "Sensor Calibration Techniques for Harsh Environments," Journal of Instrumentation, 2019.
R. D. Kokate and P. K. Mishra, "Reliable Measurement Systems for Chemical Plants," Process Control Letters, 2017.
achievements: Member of several national instrumentation standard committees.

name: Dr. Uttam M. Chaskar

publications: U. M. Chaskar, "Design of Low-Cost ECG Systems for Rural Clinics," Biomedical Instrumentation Journal, 2020.

patents: Wearable Heart Rate Monitoring Module with Artifact Rejection, India Patent (2021)
achievements: Grant for Medical Device Development from state research council (2020).

name: Dr. Rohini P. Mudhalwadkar

R. P. Mudhalwadkar, "Nanomaterial-Based Gas Sensors: Fabrication & Testing," Sensors and Actuators B, 2018.

name: Dr. Girish V. Lakhekar

name: Mrs. Meera A. Khandekar
